issues.title: chore: registry manifest version drift breaks sha256 installs
issues.body:
## Problem

`registry.json` plugin versions lagged behind `manifest.json` (weather 2.1.0 vs 2.3.0, etc.), causing install hash mismatches.

## Fix

Auto-sync versions in compute script + CI validate workflow.
issues.closeBody:
Fixed in https://github.com/krwg/cultiva-plugins/commit/16eee6af11f8f734ad17f4134989e537d44eab9f

Registry bumped to **3.0.1** with synced versions and recomputed sha256.

issues.title: refactor: deduplicate cultiva-sheet CSS across weather/time/radio/pomodoro
issues.body:
## Problem

Four plugins each duplicated ~200 lines of sheet modal CSS.

## Solution

`shared/cultiva-sheet-base.css` + `scripts/sync-sheet-css.mjs` copied into plugin folders before hash compute.

issues.title: plugins: adopt onSettingsChange hook in all six plugins
issues.body:
## Context

Cultiva 1.7 wires `onSettingsChange` on app settings save. **Zero plugins use it** — locale/theme changes require disable/re-enable.

## Tasks

- [ ] weather, time, quote, radio, pomodoro, streak
- [ ] Re-read `app.getLocale()` and refresh header/garden/sheet UI

issues.title: i18n: weather manifest settings labels are Russian-only
issues.body:
## Problem

Manifest settings (`Город`, `Единицы`, `Показывать в саду`) show in Settings → Plugin Settings for all locales.

## Fix

Locale-keyed labels in manifest or Cultiva-side plugin-i18n for settings fields.

issues.title: weather: wire or remove dead checkExtremeWeather and debug onHabitComplete hook
issues.body:
## Dead code

- `checkExtremeWeather()` defined but never called
- Debug `onHabitComplete` only console.logs

## Decision

Wire hot/cold/storm notifications OR delete dead code before next registry bump.

issues.title: pomodoro: replace emoji icon with SVG letter placeholder per style guide
issues.body:
## Problem

Pomodoro uses tomato emoji in header and sheet — violates CONTRIBUTING «no emoji in plugin UI».

## Fix

Match quote plugin SVG icon pattern; localize completion toasts (currently EN-only).

issues.title: i18n: streak plugin notifications English-only
issues.body:
## Problem

Streak Celebrator toasts ignore `app.getLocale()`.

## Also

- Debounce spam on many completions
- Settings: milestones-only mode, quiet hours

issues.title: radio: add manifest.settings for default station, volume, sleep timer
issues.body:
## Context

All controls live in sheet only — no Settings modal entry unlike time/pomodoro.

## Tasks

- [ ] manifest.settings schema
- [ ] Buffering/error state when all stream URLs fail

issues.title: time: unify manifest vs sheet settings and save UX
issues.body:
## Problem

Format/color in manifest settings; timezone only in sheet. Timezone saves immediately; format/color require Save — inconsistent.

## Proposal

Add timezone to manifest OR remove duplicate format/color from manifest.

issues.title: quote: remove unused storage permission; add onSettingsChange for locale
issues.body:
## Items

- Declares `storage` permission but never uses it
- Language switch does not refresh quote until midnight
- Optional: tap action (refresh/favorite), settings for category

issues.title: docs: update README catalog versions (quote 1.2.0, weather 2.3.0, etc.)
issues.body:
## Drift

README catalog table still lists quote 1.0.0, weather 2.1.0, pomodoro 1.0.0.

## Tasks

- [ ] Sync catalog table with registry.json
- [ ] Badge registry version 3.0.1

issues.title: registry: schema 3.1 — permissions, surfaces, i18n catalog fields
issues.body:
## Proposed fields

- `permissions`, `surfaces: ["header","garden","hooks"]`
- `settings: boolean` badge
- `i18n: { en: {name, description}, ru: {...} }` — move strings out of Cultiva binary
- `deprecated`, `replacedBy`, `publishedAt`

## CI

Fail PR if manifest version ≠ registry entry (extend validate-registry.mjs).

issues.title: plugin: Weekly Garden Stats widget (surface Cultiva 1.7 analytics in garden)
issues.body:
## Rationale

Statistics dashboard exists in Settings but not in daily garden view.

## Surface

Garden widget — weekly completion trend mini-chart.

issues.title: plugin: Habit Reflection / micro-journal on onHabitComplete
issues.body:
## Rationale

One-line reflection after completion builds mindfulness loop beyond streak toasts.

## Depends on

Stable `onHabitComplete` payload + optional storage UI.

issues.title: plugin: Morning & Evening Routine checklist widget
issues.body:
## Rationale

Ordered multi-habit ritual widget complements single habit cards.

issues.title: plugin: Gentle Nudge — you have not logged X today
issues.body:
## Rationale

Complements native notifications without cloud.

## Blocked by

Cultiva `app.getHabits()` read API (krwg/cultiva issue).

issues.title: plugin: Focus Session Logger — link pomodoro to Deep Work habit
issues.body:
## Rationale

Bridge pomodoro work phase end to `onHabitComplete` for a dedicated habit.

issues.title: plugin: Streak Grace Visualizer for Cultiva 1.7 grace day setting
issues.body:
## Rationale

Grace day exists in app settings but is invisible in garden UI.

issues.title: weather: remove legacy .weather-modal-* dead CSS block
issues.body:
## Context

~180 lines of `.weather-modal-*` rules appear unused; plugin uses `cultiva-sheet-*` markup.

## Task

Delete dead CSS; verify no regression in sheet UI.

issues.title: weather: drop GitHub raw fallback for cities-ru.json
issues.body:
## Problem

Fallback `fetch()` to GitHub raw bypasses bundled `context.data.read` intent and fails offline.

## Fix

Rely on bundled data only; surface clear error if `data.read` fails.
